completed_tasks.name: Research: 4 parallel researchers (STACK, FEATURES, ARCHITECTURE, PITFALLS)

decisions.decision: Browser automation over Microsoft Graph API
decisions.rationale: User preference; avoids Azure app registration
Personal account support deferred to v2

decisions.decision: Strictly read-only enforced at browser layer (Action Policy)
decisions.rationale: Hard safety constraint — non-negotiable; unlabeled destructive elements exist in Outlook that cannot be identified by accessible name

decisions.decision: Single outlook.js entry point with subcommands
decisions.rationale: Auth check is shared infrastructure; splitting would require 3x session checks
agent-browser default 'Chrome for Testing' is blocked by Entra Conditional Access on managed devices; must use OUTLOOK_BROWSER_PATH + OUTLOOK_BROWSER_PROFILE

decisions.decision: Action Policy set before browser launch (SAFE-01)
decisions.rationale: Clicking unlabeled generic elements without policy caused email deletion during research session
Implementation depends on verified data-automationid selectors from live Outlook snapshots
Phase 0 is mandatory pre-code gate; phases map cleanly to delivery boundaries

decisions.decision: skill must use data-automationid selectors not refs
decisions.rationale: Refs are ephemeral and re-number after DOM changes; data-automationid values are stable and named

next_action: Commit ROADMAP.md + STATE.md, then generate CLAUDE.md to complete /gsd-new-project. Run: node .claude/get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs commit 'docs: add roadmap' --files .planning/ROADMAP.md .planning/STATE.md. Then generate CLAUDE.md.
context_notes: We completed /gsd-new-project initialization. The roadmap is approved. One task remains: commit ROADMAP.md + STATE.md + generate CLAUDE.md. Key finding from this session: Entra Conditional Access blocks agent-browser's default Chrome for Testing binary — must use real Chrome/Edge via OUTLOOK_BROWSER_PATH + OUTLOOK_BROWSER_PROFILE. Also discovered that Outlook web contains unlabeled destructive element refs that triggered an accidental email deletion during research; this validated and tightened the SAFE-01 requirement. REQUIREMENTS.md grew from 28 to 34 v1 requirements. 6-phase roadmap with Phase 0 as mandatory accessibility research before any code is written.
